name: GTJA Allianz ShuangLi Classified SSE SME COMPOSITE Idx Classified Fd
summary: GTJA Allianz ShuangLi Classified SSE SME COMPOSITE Idx Classified Fd is a fund tracking the SSE SME Composite Index structured as a classified fund. It invests in small and medium-sized enterprises listed on the Shanghai Stock Exchange. It is managed by GTJA Allianz Fund Management Co. Ltd.
